# ⌛  [WPBeginner Live Workshop] Don't miss out!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-10-29 13:45:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 260

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

I just want to remind you that our FREE live workshop, "Unlock
the Secret to Growing Your Email List Fast," is happening on
November 6th at 10:30 am ET!

Have you registered yet?

You don't want to miss this opportunity to learn proven
strategies for rapid email list growth. Save your seat at the
FREE workshop today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1O5p-MPX6HbMPAQNRdQc7mLPgsfttF3yZPRk3OVK6F8 )

Here's a sneak peek at what you'll learn:

* Convert casual visitors into excited subscribers
* Design high-converting contact and opt-in forms
* Create irresistible lead magnets that drive signups

Plus, you'll get the chance to ask your burning questions during
a live Q&A with email list-building expert Angie Meeker, General
Manager of OptinMonster!

Stop struggling to grow your email list. This workshop will give
you the tools and knowledge you need to see real results.

👉 Click here to secure your FREE spot before it's too late! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1O5p-MPX6HbMPAQNRdQc7mLPgsfttF3yZPRk3OVK6F8 )

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
